answers: Debt management is a strategy to handle your debts effectively through budgeting, prioritizing payments, negotiating with creditors, and creating a structured repayment plan.
Debt manage korar jonno first shob debt list koro, high interest wala gulo age pay koro (avalanche method), ba choto gulo age sesh koro (snowball method).
A debt management plan (DMP) is a structured agreement with creditors to repay debts over time, often with reduced interest rates, typically arranged through a credit counseling agency.
Key debt management tips include avoiding new debt, paying more than minimums, consolidating high-interest debts, building an emergency fund, and tracking your spending carefully.
